Speaking of, btw, I find it hilarious how relevant the bird trivia I've been accumulating over the last couple years is for understanding certain things about the twins

Like, Castor being apparently perfectly fine with heatpats but trembling like a leaf at having his wings touched? That's a bird thing. Petting your bird's head is a perfectly platonic gesture but you're not supposed to pet their wings, chest or back because they'll think you're hitting on them
And Pollux's RF behaviour makes way more sense after seeing videos of lonely pet birds during hormone season
Details like that are really fun. I've got to read more Lovecraft to discover more of them

The gacha characters in this game, the awakeners, are, essentially, dead souls revived from a silver core and linked to the life force of a keeper (such as the protagonist). It gets a bit complicated with some characters, where it's not clear if they ever actually died or they're just magical creatures who work similarly, but that's the gist of it
